title: Platform Hardening / Production Readiness

backend_tests.failure_summary: SQLite schema created by Base.metadata.create_all(...) is missing assessments.assessment_type while the current Assessment model expects it.

environment_findings: apps/api/.env points to PostgreSQL but also enables AUTO_CREATE_SCHEMA=True
redis is not intentionally used by runtime code
background work is handled by an in-process scheduler
permission_findings: Role and venue auth coverage exists and passed in tests/test_auth.py and tests/test_authz.py
Employee venue scoping passed in tests/test_pocket_workflow.py
bootstrap route falls back to the earliest seeded user when unauthenticated

go_no_go.reason: Use for local/dev evaluation only. Do not treat as live-pilot ready until backend schema drift, migration drift, health depth, and production auth posture are hardened.
